summary: Iteration 2 verification after Timeline + new web vectors + hero shimmer were added. Backend 7/7 pytest still pass (no regressions). Frontend: Timeline section renders with id='timeline' between About and Academics, all 6 milestones (1974, 1988, 2001, 2012, 2019, 2026) present with correct data-testid='milestone-0..5', IntersectionObserver progressive reveal verified (opacity 0 -> 1 as user scrolls), SVG thread path + crawling spider found in #timeline and spider translate/rotate changes as scroll progresses (confirmed via DOM inspection). Hero 'curious' has animation-name 'shimmerText' with linear-gradient background (shimmer works). All 6 nav anchor buttons (data-testid='nav-home|about|academics|admissions|events|contact') scroll their target section into viewport. Admissions form submits successfully ('Inquiry received — our admissions team will reach out within 48 hours.'), Contact form submits successfully ('Thanks — we'll be in touch soon.'). Zero console errors on the site. Backend /api/events (seeded + sorted), /api/admissions, /api/contact endpoints still respond 200 and persist.
critical_code_review_comments: Timeline.jsx: the decorative <AsymmetricWeb> on the left uses style transform 'translateX(-40%)' and opacity 0.5 pointer-events-none — fine, but the surrounding section has overflow-hidden so portions clipped by design (OK).

Timeline.jsx: IntersectionObserver has no rootMargin — at short viewport heights the last milestone may require scrolling further than the section end. Current threshold 0.4 works on 1080p; consider rootMargin: '0px 0px -20% 0px' for shorter viewports.

Timeline.jsx: the SVG is positioned absolutely at 100% width/height of an aspect-ratio-sized box; getPointAtLength returns coordinates in the SVG's 1000x1600 viewBox, while the spider <g> transform is applied inside the same SVG — correct. On first render pathRef.current exists but getTotalLength returns 0 if the SVG is still layout-pending; the second useEffect reads pathLen from state so this is handled, but dew drops on first paint (before pathLen measured) silently skip. No visible bug.
Sections.jsx: Events cards use data-testid='event-{mongo-id}' — fine, but pattern '^event-card-' would be more discoverable. Not a bug; prior iteration documented.
Carryover from iteration 1: FastAPI startup/shutdown deprecation, seed-time logger ordering, CORS allow_credentials=True with '*' — not addressed this iteration but unrelated to current changes.
seed_data_creation: Playwright run submitted a TEST_PlayStudent admission and a TEST_PlayContact contact through the live UI (they will persist in Mongo under admissions/contacts collections; previous iteration also left TEST_ records). Backend pytest uses TEST_-prefixed fixtures; TEST_Event is deleted by test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timeline uses testids milestone-0..5 plus the section testid 'timeline-section' and id 'timeline'. Spider element is the last <g transform='translate(...) rotate(...)'> inside #timeline svg — its transform updates on scroll. Contact form testids are c-name/c-email/c-subject/c-message/c-submit (NOT contact-*). Admissions form uses adm-* testids with adm-program being a Radix Select trigger. Nav uses buttons data-testid='nav-{id}' with onClick scroll (not <a href>). All backend endpoints under /api/. Events cards use testid 'event-{uuid}'.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 9 review_request test criteria verified end-to-end.
